creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
This bug appeared again in 11.0-CURRENT r262690 ia64,
with ports at 349825. Full poudriere build log:

http://eis.bris.ac.uk/~mexas/logs/x264-0.136.2358_3.log

Error:

=======================<phase: build          >============================
===>  Building for x264-0.136.2358_3
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/x264/work/x264-snapshot-20130827-2245-stable'
cc -Wshadow -O3 -ffast-math -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -I. -I. -I/usr/local/include -std=gnu99 -fPIC -fomit-frame-pointer -fno-tree-vectorize   -c -o x264.o x264.c
In file included from common/osdep.h:60,
                 from common/common.h:91,
                 from x264.c:33:
/usr/include/math.h:282: error: expected ')' before '/' token
/usr/include/math.h:366: error: expected ')' before '/' token
gmake[1]: *** [x264.o] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/x264/work/x264-snapshot-20130827-2245-stable'
